positive: A clean, stylized minimalist illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting amongst geometric constellations and abstract nebula shapes. The fox has flowing, ethereal tails and sharp, glowing outlines. The composition should be central, with the fox facing the viewer, surrounded by negative space and stylized star maps that resemble constellations. Use deep indigos, vibrant teals, glowing gold accents, and touches of soft lavender. The style must be clean vector art mixed with magical realism poster illustration, suitable for high-contrast t-shirt printing. Flat graphic design, crisp lines, symmetrical composition, glowing accents, ethereal atmosphere.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, deformed, bad anatomy, noise, messy lines, photorealistic, 3d render, gradient wash, realistic background
